name: Execute Malicious Code via EC2 User Data
description: Simulates an attacker stopping an EC2 instance, replacing its user-data script with a malicious shell script (C2 callback), then restarting it — causing the malicious code to execute as root on the next boot.
prerequisites: EC2 instance (stratus-red-team-user-data-instance) in a running state
detection_signal: ec2:ModifyInstanceAttribute with attribute=userData on a stopped instance, especially when followed by ec2:StartInstances
